policy.known: 100% in ORT_DISABLE_ALL and default, runtime errors 0
policy.structure: checker full, strict shape inference with data_prop, truthful positive static shapes, canonical IO, standard domains, no lookup/shape-cloak/giant-Einsum, Conv bias UB0
policy.cost: official-like measured cost must be strictly below the immutable 8004.50 member

34.rule: Decode the red corners of the generator's 2x2 seed as 1-3 diagonal sprout directions; recolor the full seed and all in-grid sprout stripes with the single non-red seed color.
34.history: No non-current cheaper SHA in the exhaustive all-history union. Constant-free <=3-op direction-code synthesis found no separator using the incumbent's already-entitled scalars.
34.decision: reject: no policy-clean rebuild can beat 511

374.rule: Classify exactly three separated gray straight lines by their distinct lengths: shortest->2, middle->4, longest->1.
374.history: The only non-current cheaper-history SHA had static cost 480 but measured cost 876 and retained cloak/lookup structure.
374.decision: reject: honest measured floor is far above 481

25.rule: Preserve full guide lines, erase sparse pixels, and project each sparse pixel beside the matching-color guide line on the pixel's side; support generator transpose.
25.history: Both non-current cheaper-history SHAs cost 472 statically and were rejected for the same giant-Einsum lineage.
25.decision: reject: no policy-clean rebuild is remotely cost-competitive

250.rule: Find the red 2x2 box and clamp every gray probe independently to the surrounding 4x4 frame.

new_attempt.structure: all gates pass; truthful runtime shapes; Conv bias UB0
new_attempt.fresh: not run: mandatory known-100 gate failed first

250.history: Two cheaper-history SHAs (static 466/452) did not establish a strictly lower measured cost; the strongest clean archived control was 473 and current baseline is 468.
250.decision: reject: only strictly-cheaper new graph fails known badly

fresh_gate.reason: No new candidate cleared both strict-cost/policy and known-100 gates; per early-stop policy, expensive fresh confirmation cannot change any decision.
